name: the-india-way
description: S. Jaishankar's The India Way — foreign policy and strategic thinking toolkit examining India's role in a changing world, from avoiding strategic complacency to managing China's rise and building multi-alignment in an uncertain century
useCase: Understand Indian foreign policy, the strategic challenge of China, multi-alignment, and think strategically about a changing world
knownRisks: Jaishankar is a sitting government minister — the book reflects official Indian government perspectives
The book is written for an Indian audience and assumes familiarity with Indian history and politics
Some critiques of Western policies may be more pointed than academic analysis would be
